lessons.title: Basic Knife Skills
lessons.description: Learn how to handle a knife safely and effectively, including proper grip and cutting techniques.
steps: Choose the right knife for the task.
Practice the claw grip for safety.
Learn to chop, dice, and slice various vegetables.

lessons.title: Boiling Water
lessons.description: Understand the process of boiling water and its importance in cooking.
steps: Place it on the stove and turn on the heat.
Wait for the water to reach a rolling boil.

lessons.title: Kitchen Safety
lessons.description: Learn the essential safety practices to follow in the kitchen.
steps: Always use oven mitts when handling hot pots.
Keep knives away from the edge of the counter.
Clean spills immediately to prevent slips.
